findings.evidence: Lines 277-290 define `IsEmpty := R.toGridRectangle.IsEmptyFor x` and only expose `not_mem_interior_of_isEmpty`; roadmap line 215 names empty rectangles `Rect°(x, y)` as the target object.
findings.fix: Add characteristic lemmas such as `isEmpty_iff`, `isEmpty_iff_target`, and target/source elimination lemmas, proving target equivalence via `mem_target_pointSet_iff_of_ne` and endpoint exclusion from `cyclicOpen`.
findings.issue: `GridRectangleBetween.IsEmpty` exposes the empty-rectangle predicate for `Rect°(x, y)` but only provides the one-way source-state eliminator `not_mem_interior_of_isEmpty`; there is no `R.IsEmpty ↔ ...` theorem and no target-state characterization, although `y` differs from `x` only on boundary columns.

findings.evidence: Lines 125-147 define `columnInterior`, `rowInterior`, and `mem_interior`; the only cyclic membership theorem is `Grid.mem_cyclicOpen` at lines 56-66, with no rectangle-level bridge.
findings.fix: Add simp-normal membership/endpoint lemmas for `columnInterior` and `rowInterior` (or simp def lemmas) so users can reason about sides and cyclic inequalities without unfolding the definitions manually.
findings.issue: `columnInterior` and `rowInterior` are public definitions, but their public API has no `mem_columnInterior`/`mem_rowInterior` or endpoint lemmas; `mem_interior` stops at these aliases instead of the underlying cyclic intervals.

findings.evidence: Lines 282-285 define `GridRectangleBetween.AvoidsMarkings`; grep shows the only avoids-markings API is for `GridRectangle` at lines 190-205.
findings.fix: Add forwarding lemmas for `GridRectangleBetween.AvoidsMarkings`, at least an iff to separate O/X disjointness and direct no-O/no-X-in-interior eliminators matching the `GridRectangle` API.
findings.issue: `GridRectangleBetween.AvoidsMarkings` is a public wrapper but has no characteristic API, so downstream blocked-rectangle proofs must unfold it to use `GridRectangle.avoidsMarkings_iff` or the O/X disjoint eliminators.

summary: The exposed rectangle predicates are useful, but the public API is not yet characteristic enough for the roadmap target `Rect°(x, y)` without unfolding wrapper definitions. Add forwarding/iff lemmas for the between-state predicates and direct membership lemmas for the public interior components.
